title: Hydenock

The '''hydenock''' was a [[Species/Legends|species]] of [[Color/Legends|reddish]], curving [[Tree/Legends|trees]] [[Homeworld/Legends|native]] to [[Alderaan/Legends|Alderaan]], whose bark produced a red dye. A variant strain could be found on [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]], where the [[Gungan/Legends|Gungans]] havested it to produce [[Bubble wort/Legends|bubble wort]]. The hydenock was subsequently introduced on the [[Moon/Legends|moon]] [[Ohma-D'un/Legends|Ohma-D'un]] when it was [[Colonization of Ohma-D'un/Legends|colonized]] by the Gungans.

==Biology and appearance==
Hydenock [[Tree/Legends|trees]] had distinctive trunks that gently curved in their middle section, and both their bark and leaves were a shade of [[Color/Legends|red]]. They only grew in sandy soils, and were considered strange by some.<ref name="TGF" />

==History==
The hydenock was [[Homeworld/Legends|originated]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Alderaan/Legends|Alderaan]],<ref name="CSWE" /> one of the so-called [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]] of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]].<ref name="TEA">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref> It was often pictured in [[Alderaanian/Legends|Alderaanian]] artwork, and a strong red dye could be obtained by crushing and boiling its bark. A variant strain of the [[Species/Legends|species]] was also found on [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]],<ref name="CSWE" /> in the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]],<ref name="TEA" /> where its bark was used by the native [[Gungan/Legends|Gungans]] to produce [[Bubble wort/Legends|bubble wort]], the raw material for all Gungan [[Hydrostatic bubble/Legends|bubble buildings]].<ref name="TGF" />

When the Gungans [[Colonization of Ohma-D'un/Legends|colonized]] the [[Moon/Legends|moon]] of Naboo [[Ohma-D'un/Legends|Ohma-D'un]] in [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]], they imported many plants from all over the galaxy, including hydenocks. At some point, the hydenocks of Ohma-D'un were brought to the brink of extinction, even as the planners of [[New Otoh Gunga]] demanded more harvest to produce bubble wort. Gungan conservationists launched a "[[Save The Hydenock]]" campaign, and a third party was called in to lead a reforestation effort while making sure that the settlers had enough building material.<ref name="TGF" />
